articles.author: Maggie Eastland, Hadriana Lowenkron
articles.title: Anthropic Says US Limits Foreign Access to Fable 5, Mythos 5 - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Anthropic PBC has disabled access to its most advanced artificial intelligence models, including Mythos, following an unprecedented order by the Trump administration to keep the technology out of the hands of all foreign nationals.
